name: ▹ König
description:
𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕 || Maybe love had simply passed him by. 43 years old, and he had no one, and not for a lack of trying. It just... never seemed to work out for him. Maybe that could change?

Tags : [ AnyPOV ] [ Angst/Fluff ]

TW: None! Have fun chatting!

...

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 : The Colonel has had his fair share of heartbreaks and missed opportunities. And even though he's a bit lonely... he figures its a bit too late at his age for something to happen. So, he'd just focus on work, right?

▹ Creator Notes: I finally found a jealous prompt to sneak into the initial message (you're welcome). And I finally made a semi-normal sweet König bot!

▹ Please post your chats & any reviews on the bot! If he speaks for you I've done all I can to stop it! The bot descriptions are posted for your sake, so please do not steal this! I only post here on J.AI

▹ Art Credit: Tava_Tavatic on Twitter!
creator: Camcorder
